description: Phase 12: Add fraud detection, ad billing, agent spending limits, and dispute handling to the payments package. This completes the Phase 12 requirements that are not yet implemented.
steps: Create packages/payments/src/services/fraud-detection.service.ts - A FraudDetectionService class that performs velocity checks (too many transactions in short period), amount anomaly detection (sudden large transactions vs user history), geographic anomaly (transactions from unusual locations), device fingerprint tracking, and risk scoring. Use in-memory storage like other services. Include Zod validation schemas. Risk levels: low/medium/high/critical. Actions: allow/flag/block/review.

Create packages/payments/src/services/ad-billing.service.ts - An AdBillingService class that manages ad campaign budgets, records ad impressions/clicks/conversions with cost, enforces daily/total budget caps, calculates CPM/CPC/CPA billing, supports advertiser spending guardrails (max daily spend, max total spend), and integrates with the ledger for billing entries. Include Zod schemas for campaign creation and impression recording.

Create packages/payments/src/services/agent-spending-limit.service.ts - An AgentSpendingLimitService class that enforces per-agent spending limits (per-transaction, hourly, daily, monthly). Agents are AI actors that can spend on behalf of users. Each agent has a configured budget and requires user approval above threshold. Track spending history per agent. Include approval workflow (pending/approved/denied).

Create packages/payments/src/services/dispute.service.ts - A DisputeService class that handles payment disputes/chargebacks. Lifecycle: opened -> evidence_requested -> under_review -> resolved(won/lost). Track dispute reason (fraud, not_received, product_issue, duplicate, other), evidence submission from both parties, resolution with financial impact (refund or retain).

Add types for all new services to packages/payments/src/types.ts - FraudRiskLevel, FraudSignal, FraudCheckResult, AdCampaign, AdImpression, AdBillingRecord, AgentBudget, AgentSpendApproval, Dispute, DisputeStatus, DisputeReason, DisputeEvidence.
Export all new services and schemas from packages/payments/src/index.ts barrel.

Create packages/payments/src/services/__tests__/fraud-detection.service.test.ts with tests covering: velocity check triggers, amount anomaly detection, risk scoring, device fingerprint tracking, allow/flag/block decisions.

Create packages/payments/src/services/__tests__/ad-billing.service.test.ts with tests covering: campaign creation, impression recording, budget cap enforcement, CPM/CPC calculation, daily limit enforcement, spending guardrails.

Create packages/payments/src/services/__tests__/agent-spending-limit.service.test.ts with tests covering: budget creation, spending within limits, rejection over limits, approval workflow, hourly/daily/monthly limit tracking.
Create packages/payments/src/services/__tests__/dispute.service.test.ts with tests covering: dispute creation, evidence submission, status transitions, resolution, financial impact calculation.
Verify: pnpm --filter @quant/payments typecheck passes. pnpm --filter @quant/payments test passes. pnpm --filter @quant/payments build passes.
acceptance_criteria: FraudDetectionService detects velocity and amount anomalies and returns risk scores
AdBillingService manages campaigns with budget caps and records billing events
AgentSpendingLimitService enforces per-agent spending budgets with approval workflows
DisputeService handles dispute lifecycle from opening to resolution
All new services have comprehensive test coverage
pnpm --filter @quant/payments test passes with all new tests green
